parsedJson.summary: The site has clear roofing imagery and visible contact options, but the hero area feels crowded and the quote form is too heavy for a local customer who wants fast reassurance.

issues.title: Hero message feels crowded
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero uses two large orange translucent text boxes over the roof photo, with oversized white text taking up much of the left side.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching Brisbane customer wants to quickly know whether this roofer is credible and easy to contact. The stacked blocks compete with the photo and form, so the page feels loud instead of reassuring.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One clear headline, one short supporting line, and one primary phone or quote button over a darker photo overlay, with enough spacing around each element.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the two orange text panels with a single left-aligned hero message: headline, short proof line such as 'Metal roof replacements across Brisbane', and a prominent call button.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一屏的信息太挤，两个橙色大框和大字让人一眼看过去有点乱。
issues.customer_impact: 客户通常会在几秒内判断这家公司靠不靠谱；如果第一眼觉得乱或费劲，很多人会直接回到 Google 商家列表点下一家。

issues.title: Quote form asks too much too soon
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the right-side quote form asks for name, email, phone, job address, description, and file upload immediately above the fold.
issues.why_problem: Someone comparing roofers may not be ready to fill out a long form before they trust the business. The number of fields can make the job feel like effort, especially before seeing proof of workmanship or service guarantees.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter first-step form with name, phone, suburb, and job type, plus a secondary option to upload photos later.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Turn the quote panel into a compact lead form: phone number, suburb, service dropdown, and 'Request callback' button; move description and file upload to step two or below the first screen.
issues.plain_explanation: 报价表单一开始就要填太多内容，还要上传文件，客户会觉得麻烦。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户很多只是想先问价格或确认能不能来；表单越长，放弃填写的人越多，特别是从 Google 商家资料点进来的手机客户。

issues.title: Mobile quote form is mostly hidden
issues.what_observed: In the mobile screenshot, only the 'Request a Free Quote' heading is visible near the bottom of the screen, while the actual form fields are below the fold.
issues.why_problem: Most local roofing searches happen on phones. If the visitor sees a form title but no field or submit button, they have to keep scrolling before they can act, which adds friction at the exact moment they may be ready to enquire.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: On mobile, the first screen should show either a tap-to-call button and one short enquiry field, or a sticky bottom bar with Call and Quote actions.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a sticky mobile action bar with 'Call' and 'Get Quote' buttons, and place the first form field directly under the quote heading without excess vertical spacing.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机上只能看到“申请免费报价”的标题，看不到马上可以填写或提交的地方。
issues.customer_impact: 大约多数本地搜索来自手机；如果客户点进来后不能立刻打电话或询价，就很容易退出去联系另一个屋顶工。

issues.title: Trust proof feels thin
issues.what_observed: The header shows a Google rating of 5.0 based on 10 reviews, but there are no visible customer photos, project examples, licence details, or service guarantees in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: Roof work is expensive and risky for homeowners. A 5-star rating helps, but only 10 reviews may not be enough by itself to convince someone before they share their address or request a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above the fold should include 2-3 concrete trust signals such as licensed and insured, Brisbane-based, before-and-after roof photos, warranty wording, or recent suburb work.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a compact proof strip below the hero message or form: 'Licensed & insured', 'Brisbane metal roofing specialists', 'Workmanship warranty', and one small project photo thumbnail.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面虽然有 Google 评分，但第一屏缺少执照、保险、保修、案例照片这些让人放心的信息。
issues.customer_impact: 换屋顶是大额决定，客户会更谨慎；如果看不到足够证明，他们可能不会留下电话和地址，尤其是在同时比较 3 到 5 家公司的时候。

issues.title: Navigation looks heavy
issues.what_observed: The desktop navigation uses bold black uppercase labels across the full width, while the orange active 'HOME' label and orange call button compete for attention.
issues.why_problem: The page asks visitors to process too many strong visual signals at once. A local customer should be guided toward calling or requesting a quote, not scanning a heavy menu first.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A quieter navigation row with regular-weight labels, one highlighted phone button, and fewer competing orange elements.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce menu font weight, keep only the primary call button in orange, and use a subtle underline or background for the active page state.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部菜单字太重，颜色重点太多，容易分散客户对电话按钮的注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 客户进站后最重要的动作是打电话或询价；如果导航抢走注意力，会降低他们马上联系的可能。

issues.title: Upload area dominates form
issues.what_observed: The desktop quote form ends with a large pale blue file-upload box and a bright blue 'Choose Files...' button that visually stands out more than some required fields.
issues.why_problem: Uploading roof photos may be useful, but making it so prominent can make the quote process feel complicated. Some visitors may think they need photos ready before they can enquire.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Photo upload should be optional and visually secondary, with a small link or compact upload control after the main contact fields.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Shrink the upload component, label it 'Optional roof photos', and place it after the primary submit button or in the second step of the quote flow.
issues.plain_explanation: 上传照片区域太大，会让客户误以为必须准备照片才能询价。
issues.customer_impact: 很多人只是想先问问能不能做、多少钱；如果感觉流程复杂，他们可能会先放弃，导致少拿到询价线索。

positive_observations: The phone number is visible on both desktop and mobile without scrolling.
The roof photography is relevant and immediately shows the type of work.
The Google rating is placed prominently in the header.
redesign_priorities: 1. Simplify the hero into one clear message with a stronger call and quote action.
2. Shorten the quote form and make mobile enquiry actionable above the fold.
3. Add concrete trust proof such as licence, insurance, warranty, and project examples.
